commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR widens terminal `chat.send` ACK status propagation across Web, Android, Swift, TUI, ACP, gateway Talk, slash-command forwarding, and Skill Workshop schema paths with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +329, Tests +603, Other +615. Total +1547 across 31 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection, not by an executed repro in this read-only review. Current main can emit terminal `chat.send` ACKs, current clients collapse or skip some statuses, and the PR still leaves the TUI `/btw` terminal branch unhandled.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] One narrow TUI handler repair remains: handle terminal ACKs for detached `/btw` and `/side` sends and add focused tests.

target.title: fix: handle terminal chat send acknowledgements
target.body:
## Summary

What problem does this PR solve?

- Preserves terminal `chat.send` acknowledgement status (`ok`, `timeout`, `error`) through client and helper paths that previously reduced the response to “has a run id”.
- Clears or restores pending/optimistic state when the gateway has already returned a terminal acknowledgement, so clients do not wait for future run events that will not arrive.
- Extends the same handling to forwarded paths such as queued Web sends, detached `/btw`, queued `/steer`, `/redirect` via `sessions.steer`, Android mic/chat/Talk flows, native Talk flows, TUI, ACP, and the Skill Workshop forwarded schema.

Why does this matter now?

Terminal acknowledgements are part of the `chat.send` contract. If a client treats a terminal ACK as an accepted active run, it can leave a message, mic turn, or queued command stuck until timeout or a later refresh.

What is the intended outcome?

Clients branch on ACK status instead of only checking `runId`: active statuses keep the existing pending-run flow, while terminal statuses clear pending state, restore retryable queue/draft state where appropriate, or surface failure copy.

What is intentionally out of scope?

- Redesigning the public SDK `Session.send` API shape.
- Standardizing every cross-client terminal-timeout message/toast policy.
- Claiming Swift compile/lint coverage in this local environment.

What does success look like?

Terminal ACKs no longer leave in-scope clients tracking a non-running run id, and regression tests cover the status-preserving branches across the touched surfaces.

What should reviewers focus on?

- Whether each touched consumer preserves `runId` and `status` until the final caller branches.
- Whether terminal `ok` / `timeout` / `error` branches clear or restore pending state without breaking non-terminal `started` / `in_flight` behavior.
- Whether the `sessions.steer` and Skill Workshop forwarded paths keep their protocol contracts aligned with `chat.send`.

## Linked context

Which issue does this close?

Closes #91048

Which issues, PRs, or discussions are related?

Related #84176
Related #84306

Was this requested by a maintainer or owner?

No direct maintainer request; this follows the terminal ACK contract through additional consumers.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed:
Terminal `chat.send` / forwarded ACKs with `status: "ok" | "timeout" | "error"` should not be treated as accepted active runs by Web, Android, TUI, ACP, gateway Talk, or slash-command consumers. The added live proof exercises the widened terminal `timeout` path.

- Real environment tested:
Local OpenClaw source checkout on Linux using repository test runners, Android JVM/Robolectric, and a real local Gateway server + WebSocket RPC harness that drove the Control UI `sendChatMessage` controller source against a terminal `timeout` ACK. Hosted PR checks on the same head covered macOS Swift, Android build/test, production/test types, and the repository real-behavior proof checker.

- Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/gateway-protocol/src/schema/agents-models-skills.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/talk.test.ts src/tui/gateway-chat.test.ts src/tui/tui-command-handlers.test.ts src/acp/translator.lifecycle.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/slash-command-executor.node.test.ts
cd apps/android && ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/opt/android-sdk ./gradlew :app:testPlayDebugUnitTest --tests ai.openclaw.app.gateway.ChatSendAckTest --tests ai.openclaw.app.chat.ChatControllerTerminalAckTest --tests ai.openclaw.app.voice.MicCaptureManagerTest
pnpm tsgo:core && pnpm tsgo:test:ui && pnpm tsgo:test:packages
node scripts/oxlint-changed.mjs apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/NodeRuntime.kt apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/chat/ChatController.kt apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/gateway/ChatSendAck.kt apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/voice/MicCaptureManager.kt apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/voice/TalkModeManager.kt src/acp/translator.ts src/gateway/talk-agent-consult.ts src/tui/gateway-chat.ts src/tui/tui-command-handlers.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts ui/src/ui/chat/slash-command-executor.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.ts
git diff --check

# Additional live terminal-ACK proof, using a temporary uncommitted harness copied to
# src/gateway/pr91049-live-terminal-ack-proof.test.ts for collection, then removed.
PR91049_HEAD=c18e743ba4ced535ec5351ba536a542db3d7621f node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/pr91049-live-terminal-ack-proof.test.ts
```

- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output):

Focused suite output from this branch:

```text
Test Files 9 passed (9)
Tests 237 passed (237)
Android JVM: BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 3s
Type checks: pnpm tsgo:core, tsgo:test:ui, tsgo:test:packages passed
Touched TypeScript oxlint: Found 0 warnings and 0 errors
```

Live Gateway + Control UI terminal-ACK proof from current head `c18e743ba4ced535ec5351ba536a542db3d7621f`:

```text
✓ gateway-core ../../src/gateway/pr91049-live-terminal-ack-proof.test.ts (1 test)
✓ gateway-server ../../src/gateway/pr91049-live-terminal-ack-proof.test.ts (1 test)
✓ gateway-client ../../src/gateway/pr91049-live-terminal-ack-proof.test.ts (1 test)
Test Files 3 passed (3)
Tests 3 passed (3)
```

Copied proof artifact from that run:

```json
{
  "proofKind": "real Gateway server + WebSocket RPC + Control UI sendChatMessage state cleanup",
  "branchHead": "c18e743ba4ced535ec5351ba536a542db3d7621f",
  "scenario": {
    "terminalStatus": "timeout",
    "gatewayTerminalAck": {
      "runId": "00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000091049",
      "status": "timeout",
      "summary": "aborted"
    },
    "uiResult": null,
    "uiStateAfter": {
      "chatSending": false,
      "chatRunId": null,
      "chatStream": null,
      "chatMessagesLength": 0,
      "lastError": "The run ended before the message was accepted."
    }
  }
}
```

Hosted PR checks on the same head:

- `CI / android-build-play`: `SUCCESS` (https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27086306289/job/79941374792)
- `CI / android-test-play`: `SUCCESS` (https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27086306289/job/79941374787)
- `CI / check-prod-types`: `SUCCESS` (https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27086306289/job/79941374821)
- `CI / check-test-types`: `SUCCESS` (https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27086306289/job/79941374815)
- `CI / macos-swift`: `SUCCESS` (https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27086306289/job/79941374768)
- `Real behavior proof / Real behavior proof`: `SUCCESS` (https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27086471702/job/79941815483)

- Observed result after fix:
The focused suites cover terminal ACK handling for protocol schema, gateway Talk, TUI, ACP, slash-command forwarding, and Android chat/mic ACK handling. The live Gateway proof shows a terminal `timeout` ACK returned over WebSocket to the Control UI `sendChatMessage` path; after the ACK, local pending state is cleared (`chatSending:false`, `chatRunId:null`, `chatStream:null`), the optimistic message is removed, and user-visible error state is set instead of leaving a stuck pending run. Hosted checks on this head show macOS Swift, Android, production/test types, and the real-behavior proof checker succeeded.

- What was not tested:
Full browser/device manual UI testing was not performed. The live proof exercises the Control UI controller source and Gateway WebSocket transport, not a screenshot-driven browser session. The only current hosted CI failure is `CI / check-lint`, which fails in `scripts/e2e/lib/fixtures/workspace.mjs`, a file outside this PR diff; the same lint failure reproduces on current upstream `main`.

- Proof limitations or environment constraints:
The live proof controls the agent reply boundary through the repository Gateway test seam so `chat.abort` can deterministically produce a terminal `timeout` ACK. Gateway transport, idempotency caching, terminal ACK payload, and the Control UI controller cleanup path are real source code. The temporary proof harness was not committed to the feature branch.

- Before evidence (optional but encouraged):
Focused RED tests were used during development for Web helper callers, Android mic terminal statuses, ACP terminal `ok`, and `/redirect` terminal ACK handling before the fixes were applied.

## Tests and validation

Which commands did you run?

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ...` focused JS suite listed in the Real behavior proof section.
- `cd apps/android && ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/opt/android-sdk ./gradlew :app:testPlayDebugUnitTest --tests ...` for `ChatSendAckTest`, `ChatControllerTerminalAckTest`, and `MicCaptureManagerTest`.
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:packages`
- `node scripts/oxlint-changed.mjs ...` on touched TypeScript files.
- `git diff --check`

What regression coverage was added or updated?

- Web direct send, queued send, detached `/btw`, queued `/steer`, and `/redirect` terminal ACK behavior.
- Android ACK parsing, chat controller terminal ACK handling, and mic terminal ACK handling.
- Gateway Talk terminal ACK rejection before realtime subscription.
- ACP terminal `ok` parity with terminal timeout/error.
- TUI terminal ACK send-result handling.
- Skill Workshop forwarded ACK schema accepting the widened terminal statuses.

What failed before this fix, if known?

RED coverage showed terminal ACK helper callers and Android mic handling could still collapse or discard terminal statuses after the initial propagation work. `/redirect` also treated terminal forwarded ACKs as a successful redirect with a tracked run id.

If no test was added, why not?

Tests were added or updated for the main status-preserving branches. Swift source changes include test updates, but Swift execution could not be run locally because the toolchain is unavailable here.

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

Yes. Clients now clear, restore, or fail pending state when the gateway returns a terminal ACK instead of waiting for future run events.

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No.

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No.

What is the highest-risk area?

Session/chat lifecycle state: clearing pending or optimistic state too early could hide a message, while not clearing it leaves clients stuck.

How is that risk mitigated?

The patch preserves non-terminal `started` / `in_flight` behavior, keeps `runId` remapping where needed, restores retryable draft/queue state on terminal failure, and adds regression coverage for the changed branches.

## Current review state

What is the next action?

Review the status-preserving ACK branches and run CI on the PR branch.

What is still waiting on author, maintainer, CI, or external proof?

- CI has not run on the PR branch yet.
- Swift compile/test/lint needs CI or a Swift-equipped environment.
- Exact base-branch CI was incomplete/pending at PR-prep time, so PR CI should be interpreted with current base health in mind.

Which bot or reviewer comments were addressed?

None on this PR yet; this is the initial submission for #91048.
